argocd-ghsa.title: GHSA-xxxx: Argo CD path traversal allows reading arbitrary files (CVE-2026-12345)
argocd-ghsa.summary: A high severity vulnerability (CVSS 8.1) in Argo CD versions before 2.11.5 allows an authenticated user to read arbitrary files on the repo-server via path traversal. Patched in 2.11.5. Critical for multi-tenant installs.

keda-releases.title: KEDA v2.22.0 - breaking change to ScaledObject API
keda-releases.summary: This release removes the deprecated v1alpha1 ScaledObject fields. Breaking change: you must migrate manifests before upgrading. Action required for clusters on 2.19 and earlier.

k8s-changelog.title: Kubernetes 1.33 released; 1.30 enters end of support window
k8s-changelog.summary: Kubernetes 1.33 is available. Note: 1.30 will reach end of standard support; EKS clusters on 1.30 should plan an upgrade. Several beta APIs deprecated.

kyverno-releases.title: Helm chart cert-manager v1.15 released
kyverno-releases.summary: Routine release of cert-manager, a component you do not run.
